description: Style NoteTake casual dressing to the next level with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe for those days at the lounge. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look.  Product DetailsBlack slip on with a midfoot strap across the tongueStitch detail along the seams of the toe boxTPU outsole with a stacked heel (grooves on the heel)Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
